sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna zol zui kei-in, Na zuih leh khial ding,
Khatvei zo phot lecin, Azom zawh nop ding
Pasal nakpi'n do in, Lung gulhna mialpi,
Zeisu en gige in, Hong zawhpih ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tha hong pia hong kem ding in.
Hong huh nuam hi Topa in,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kholhpih gilo peel in, Kam hoihlo zang ke'n,
Pasian min zahtak in, A mawkna'n zang ke'n,
Thu khualin citak in, Thumaan in migi,
Zeisu en gige in, Hong zawhpih ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Azote Pasian in, Kham lukhu pia ding,
Ipuk kha zel hangin, Upna tawh zo ding,
Eite hong Honpain, Tha hong quan ding hi,
Zeisu en gige in, Hong zawhpih ding hi.
